---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for BAM! Quiz
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the problem or gap you are experiencing.

**Describe the feature**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Who benefits from this?**
- [ ] Beginner learners
- [ ] Intermediate / advanced learners
- [ ] All users

**Additional context**
Any mockups, examples from other sites, or extra context.
